beats.activity: Wake up, coffee, check work emails and transit alerts.
beats.reasoning: Low energy (45/100) from yesterday's late evening; wakes early out of habit but moves slowly. Transit strike means drive-only today—already planning the route to Renton.

beats.activity: Drive to Renton office; mild weather makes the commute pleasant.
beats.reasoning: I-405 clear this early; no transit means car is the only option. Partly cloudy and 68F makes it bearable after yesterday's heat.

beats.activity: Audit calls, stakeholder meetings, and security review work at desk.
beats.reasoning: Cybersecurity audit cycle continues; routine work provides structure on a low-energy day. No breaks—focused morning blocks.

beats.activity: Grab lunch at nearby deli, eat at desk while monitoring emails.
beats.reasoning: Staying close to office; low energy means minimal wandering. Quick, practical meal.

beats.activity: Continue audit work, wrap up client calls before transit strike ends.
beats.reasoning: Afternoon push to finish before 4pm when transit resumes; by staying focused, avoids surge pricing on rideshare if needed later.

beats.activity: Drive back to Bellevue; take it slow on I-405 as traffic picks up.
beats.reasoning: Transit strike ending; still driving to avoid surge pricing. Partly cloudy evening is pleasant; arrives home with time for quiet evening.

beats.activity: Change clothes, prep studio, throw clay on the wheel.
beats.reasoning: Low energy day calls for hands-on, meditative pottery; no crowds, just tactile focus. Camera sits nearby in case light improves.

beats.activity: Simple dinner: pasta and greens, tea, review today's photos.
beats.reasoning: Homebody preference; quiet evening meal at home. Film camera review is low-key ritual that unwinds the day.

beats.activity: Check stargazing forecast for the week, organize photography notes, light reading.
beats.reasoning: Partly cloudy but not ideal for stargazing tonight; planning ahead for better conditions. Competitive nature means tracking skies like a hobby project.

world_event_prompt: Mild, partly cloudy Thursday, high of 68F. Citywide transit strike: all Metro buses and Link Light Rail suspended until 4pm. Rideshare surge pricing in effect.
